ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "mobile_no" TEXT /* Mobile phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential or mailing address of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the credit card */,
  "card_no" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card (e.g., Gold, Silver) */,
  "exp_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credit card */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the credit card */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit card was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the credit card (e.g., active, suspended, expired) */,
  "last_usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the credit card */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the credit card */,
  "security_code" TEXT /* Security code of the credit card (encrypted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit card used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, withdrawal) */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant where the transaction occurred */,
  "merchant_category" TEXT /* Category of the merchant (e.g., grocery, entertainment) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "foreign_transaction" INTEGER /* Whether the transaction was made in a foreign country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES credit_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who is associated with the location */,
  "base_location" TEXT /* Base location of the customer (e.g., city, state) */,
  "base_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the base location */,
  "base_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the base location */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the customer (e.g., city, state) */,
  "current_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the current location */,
  "current_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the current location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Doctor, Entrepreneur) */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income for the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Post_Grad, Grad) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the education level */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study associated with the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "card_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card type */,
  "card_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the credit card type (e.g., Gold, Silver) */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual fee for the credit card type */,
  "reward_program" TEXT /* Reward program associated with the credit card type */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the credit card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., purchase, withdrawal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction type (e.g., financial, non-financial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, employee) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for communication */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being analyzed */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions made by the customer */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of transactions made by the customer */,
  "total_transaction_value" REAL /* Total value of transactions made by the customer */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "average_transaction_frequency" REAL /* Average frequency of transactions (e.g., transactions per month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., age group, occupation) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)
